title: pkcs11 algorithm() docstring says 'Panics' but function returns Result
description: The struct field comment (line ~50-54) says 'Panics on HSM error rather than silently returning the wrong algorithm' and the method docstring repeats 'Panics if the HSM is unreachable'. But algorithm() has signature Result<SigningAlgorithm, SecretError> and the implementation propagates errors via ?; it never panics. A contributor calling algorithm() and expecting Ok-or-panic will instead get an Err that they might not handle because the docs said 'panics'. Fix: update the comment/docstring to say 'Returns Err if the HSM is unreachable or the key object is missing.'
